nitrati: <svg viewBox="0 0 150 86" font-family="Nunito,sans-serif" fill="none"><text x="24" y="40" text-anchor="middle" font-size="7" font-weight="800" fill="#3a322b">nitrate</text><g stroke="#3a322b" stroke-width="2.4" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><line x1="40" y1="36" x2="56" y2="36"/><path d="M52 32 l5 4 -5 4"/><line x1="76" y1="36" x2="92" y2="36"/><path d="M88 32 l5 4 -5 4"/></g><text x="66" y="40" text-anchor="middle" font-size="9" font-weight="800" fill="#ff9f5a">NO</text><text x="112" y="38" text-anchor="middle" font-size="8" font-weight="800" fill="#5bc873">cGMP ↑</text><text x="75" y="60" text-anchor="middle" font-size="7" font-weight="800" fill="#3a322b">relaxes smooth muscle</text><text x="75" y="76" text-anchor="middle" font-size="8" font-weight="800" fill="#4ea8de">veins → ↓ preload</text></svg>
bifosfonati: <svg viewBox="0 0 150 96" font-family="Nunito,sans-serif" fill="none"><text x="75" y="13" text-anchor="middle" font-size="6.5" font-weight="800" fill="#3a322b">the bisphosphonate anchors → osteoclast dies</text><rect x="14" y="62" width="122" height="22" rx="4" fill="#ffce3a" fill-opacity=".25" stroke="#3a322b" stroke-width="2.2"/><text x="75" y="77" text-anchor="middle" font-size="6.5" font-weight="800" fill="#6f6253">bone (hydroxyapatite)</text><g stroke="#3a322b" stroke-width="2"><line x1="40" y1="62" x2="40" y2="54"/><line x1="62" y1="62" x2="62" y2="54"/><line x1="104" y1="62" x2="104" y2="54"/></g><g font-size="5.5" font-weight="800" fill="#b07cd6" text-anchor="middle"><text x="40" y="50">BP</text><text x="62" y="50">BP</text><text x="104" y="50">BP</text></g><circle cx="80" cy="34" r="13" fill="#ff6b6b" fill-opacity=".2" stroke="#3a322b" stroke-width="2.2"/><text x="80" y="37" text-anchor="middle" font-size="5" font-weight="800" fill="#3a322b">osteoclast</text><g stroke="#ff6b6b" stroke-width="2.4" stroke-linecap="round"><line x1="72" y1="27" x2="88" y2="41"/><line x1="88" y1="27" x2="72" y2="41"/></g></svg>
incretine: <svg viewBox="0 0 150 96" font-family="Nunito,sans-serif" fill="none"><circle cx="28" cy="48" r="15" fill="#5bc873" fill-opacity=".25" stroke="#3a322b" stroke-width="2.2"/><text x="28" y="46" text-anchor="middle" font-size="7" font-weight="800" fill="#3a322b">GLP-1</text><text x="28" y="56" text-anchor="middle" font-size="4.5" font-weight="700" fill="#6f6253">agonist</text><g stroke="#3a322b" stroke-width="2.2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><line x1="46" y1="30" x2="66" y2="22"/><path d="M62 20 l5 2 -2 5"/><line x1="46" y1="42" x2="66" y2="42"/><path d="M62 38 l5 4 -5 4"/><line x1="46" y1="54" x2="66" y2="62"/><path d="M62 58 l5 4 -4 5"/><line x1="46" y1="66" x2="66" y2="80"/><path d="M62 75 l5 5 -6 2"/></g><g font-size="6.5" font-weight="800"><text x="70" y="24" fill="#5bc873">insulin ↑ gluc-dep.</text><text x="70" y="45" fill="#3a322b">glucagon ↓</text><text x="70" y="65" fill="#3a322b">gastric emptying ↓</text><text x="70" y="84" fill="#4ea8de">appetite ↓ → weight ↓</text></g></svg>
mao: <svg viewBox="0 0 150 90" font-family="Nunito,sans-serif" fill="none"><text x="30" y="38" text-anchor="middle" font-size="7" font-weight="800" fill="#3a322b">tyramine</text><text x="30" y="48" text-anchor="middle" font-size="5" font-weight="700" fill="#6f6253">(cheese, wine)</text><g stroke="#3a322b" stroke-width="2.4" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><line x1="52" y1="34" x2="74" y2="34"/><path d="M70 30 l5 4 -5 4"/></g><text x="63" y="28" text-anchor="middle" font-size="6" font-weight="800" fill="#6f6253">MAO</text><g stroke="#ff6b6b" stroke-width="2.4" stroke-linecap="round"><line x1="56" y1="28" x2="70" y2="40"/><line x1="70" y1="28" x2="56" y2="40"/></g><text x="63" y="52" text-anchor="middle" font-size="6.5" font-weight="800" fill="#ff6b6b">MAOI</text><text x="108" y="30" text-anchor="middle" font-size="7" font-weight="800" fill="#3a322b">tyramine ↑↑</text><text x="108" y="48" text-anchor="middle" font-size="7.5" font-weight="800" fill="#ff6b6b">hypertensive crisis</text><text x="75" y="78" text-anchor="middle" font-size="6.5" font-weight="800" fill="#6f6253">«cheese effect»</text></svg>
